originalTitle: South Africa condemns 'fake videos' of alleged xenophobic attacks
title: Let's Be Kind: A Story from Our African Family!
content:
Hello, Super Friends!

Hello, amazing kids of Africa! Your friendly news reporter is here. Today, we are talking about something very important. It's about being kind and knowing what is true. We are going to talk about two wonderful countries in our big African family: South Africa and Ghana. Something a little tricky is happening, but we can learn about it together.

What is 'Xenophobia'? It Means Being Friends with Everyone!

That's a very big word, isn't it? 'Xenophobia' (pronounced Zee-no-FO-bee-ah). It just means being scared of people from other countries. Or sometimes, it means being not kind to people who are from a different place. But guess what? In Africa, we are one big family! We have so many different countries and people. We should always be kind to everyone, no matter where they come from. It's like being kind to your new friend at school, even if they moved from a different town. Did you know? Africa has 54 countries! That's a lot of friends to make!

What Are 'Fake Videos'? They Are Not True!

Sometimes, people make videos that are not true. They put them on the internet. These are called 'fake videos'. They might show old things, or things that didn't really happen. Imagine someone telling you a story that isn't true. That's like a fake video! They can make people feel scared or angry for no good reason. It's important to know what is real and what is not real. Did you know? It's always good to ask a grown-up if something you see online is real or fake.

South Africa Says: 'Stop Fake Videos! Be Kind!'

Our friends in South Africa are very sad about these fake videos. They say these videos are making people think bad things about their country. They say the videos are not true. The leaders in South Africa want everyone to be kind. They want people to stop sharing these fake videos. They want everyone to know that they welcome friends from all over Africa. They believe in friendship and respect. South Africa is a beautiful country. It's often called the 'Rainbow Nation' because it has so many different kinds of people living there happily together!

Ghana Wants to Help Find the Truth!

Now, let's talk about Ghana. Ghana is another wonderful country in Africa. They heard about the worries and the fake videos. The leaders in Ghana want to help! They want to send some special 'truth-finders'. These truth-finders will go to South Africa. They will look and listen very carefully. They will find out what is truly happening. It's like when you lose your toy, and your friend helps you look for it. Ghana wants to be a good friend and help find the truth for everyone. Did you know? Ghana is famous for its delicious cocoa, which is used to make yummy chocolate!

The African Union: Our Big African Family Club!

Who are these truth-finders from? They are from something called the African Union! The African Union is like a very, very big club for almost all the countries in Africa. Imagine all your classmates, and your friends from other classes, all in one big club. That's what the African Union is like! They meet to help each other. They want all countries in Africa to be happy and safe. They want peace and friendship. So, when Ghana asks the African Union to send truth-finders, it means our big African family is working together to solve a problem. They want to make sure everyone is treated fairly and kindly. Did you know? The African Union tries to help countries work together, like brothers and sisters in a big family.

Why Is This Important, My Friends?

This whole story is important for a few big reasons. First, it's about being kind. We always want to be kind to everyone, no matter where they come from. Second, it's about finding the truth. Fake videos can be tricky and make people believe wrong things. It's brave to ask questions and find out what is really, really true. And third, it shows how our African family helps each other. When one country has a worry, other countries want to help. We are all connected, like links in a strong chain.

Let's Be Friends and Find the Truth Together!

So, remember, my amazing African friends: always be kind to everyone. Ask grown-ups about things you see that make you wonder. And let's hope the truth-finders help everyone in South Africa and Ghana feel happy and safe. We are one big, loving African family!
summary: South Africa is sad because fake videos about being unkind to people from other countries are spreading, and Ghana wants the African Union to send people to find out the real truth.
whyMatters: It's important to be kind to everyone, no matter where they come from, and to always know the truth instead of believing fake stories or videos.

originalTitle: DR Congo president hints at extending his term and delaying polls
title: A Big Idea from DR Congo's President!
content:
Hello, Super Friends!

Hello, amazing young adventurers! Your friendly news reporter from Africa is here to tell you about something interesting happening in a very big country called DR Congo. It's a land full of amazing animals and kind people, right in the heart of Africa! Today, we're talking about the president of DR Congo. Do you know what a president is? It's like the head teacher of a whole country! They help everyone, make big choices, and try to make life good for all the people in their country.

Meet President Tshisekedi!

The president of DR Congo is called Mr. Félix Tshisekedi. He is a very important leader for his country. He works hard to help all the boys and girls, and their families, have a good life. Did you know? DR Congo is short for the Democratic Republic of Congo! It's a very big name for a very big country!

What is a 'Term'?

Now, imagine you're playing your favorite game. Sometimes, there are rules about how long you can play, right? Maybe you can play for 10 minutes, and then someone else gets a turn. That's a bit like being a president! Presidents have a special time they are allowed to be the leader. We call this time a 'term'. In many countries, there are rules about how many terms a president can have. It helps make sure lots of different people get a chance to be the leader. Mr. Tshisekedi is the president right now. His time, or his 'term', is set to finish in a few years, in 2028. That means he would normally step down and let new elections happen to choose a new president.

A Special Message from the President!

But guess what? President Tshisekedi said something very interesting the other day! He said that if many, many people in DR Congo want him to stay as president for another time, maybe for a third 'term', he would say 'yes'! This means he is thinking about staying as president longer than the usual rules say. It's like saying, "If my friends want me to keep playing the game, even after my time is up, I will!" Did you know? The capital city of DR Congo is called Kinshasa! It's a very busy and exciting city!

Why Rules Are Important

Why do countries have rules about how long a president can stay? Well, rules help keep things fair for everyone. They make sure that many different voices can be heard. When a president steps down after their terms, it gives other good leaders a chance to help the country. It's part of how a country stays a 'democracy'. What is a democracy? It means that the people, like you and me, get to help choose their leaders. It's about everyone having a say in how their country is run. That's why voting is so important!

Choosing Leaders: Elections!

How do people choose their leaders? They do it by something called an 'election'! An election is when grown-ups go to a special place and put a secret vote for who they think should be president. It's like when your class votes for a class captain! Everyone gets one vote, and the person with the most votes wins. This is how new presidents are chosen when an old president's term finishes. Did you know? DR Congo is home to amazing animals like gorillas, okapis (a relative of the giraffe!), and chimpanzees! It has rich rainforests too.

What Happens Next?

So, President Tshisekedi has shared his thoughts. Now, people in DR Congo, and all around the world, are thinking about what this means. Will the rules change? Will he stay longer? It's a big question for the people of DR Congo. They will talk, discuss, and decide what is best for their country. It's a journey for them to make important choices about their future and their leaders. It's important to remember that leaders listen to their people. So, what the people of DR Congo want will be very important in this story.

A Big and Beautiful African Country

DR Congo is the second-biggest country in all of Africa! It's so big it has many different types of land, from big rivers like the Congo River to tall mountains and thick forests. It has many different languages and cultures, making it a very special place. News like this helps us learn about how countries work and how leaders help their people. And that's the news from DR Congo for today, super friends! Keep exploring and learning about our amazing world!
summary: The president of DR Congo, Mr. Tshisekedi, hinted he might stay longer than his term limit of 2028 if the people want him to, which is a big question for his country's rules about how long leaders can serve.
whyMatters: This is important because it's about the rules of a country and how long leaders stay, which helps keep things fair and gives everyone a chance to choose their leaders in a democracy.

originalTitle: What’s ‘Mbappe Out’, and why are fans demanding Real Madrid star’s exit?
title: Superstar Mbappe: Some Fans Want Him to Go! What's the Big News?
content:
Jambo, amazing football fans and future stars of Africa! Your friendly news reporter is here with some exciting, and a little bit confusing, news from the world of football. We're talking about a famous player, Kylian Mbappe, and a super big team called Real Madrid. Get ready to learn all about it!

Who is Kylian Mbappe?

Imagine a superhero on the football field! That's Kylian Mbappe. He is a very, very fast and talented football player from France. He is known for his amazing speed, like a cheetah, and how he can score so many goals. When he runs with the ball, it's like magic! He is one of the best players in the whole wide world. Mbappe wears special football boots and a jersey when he plays. He makes football look so easy and fun. Many children, maybe even you, dream of playing football like him one day. He makes big crowds cheer and jump with joy every time he touches the ball near the goal. Did you know? Kylian Mbappe started playing football when he was a very small boy! He loved the game so much that he practiced every single day. This shows that if you love something and work hard, you can become amazing at it, just like Mbappe!

What is Real Madrid?

Now, let's talk about Real Madrid. This is a super famous football team. They are from a country called Spain. Real Madrid is like a giant, wonderful family of football players. They wear white jerseys, and many people around the world love them. Real Madrid has won many, many big trophies. They are known for having some of the best players ever in their team. Think of them as champions, always trying their best to win games and make their fans proud. Their stadium, where they play, is very big and loud when fans cheer. Did you know? Real Madrid has been playing football for over 120 years! That's a very, very long time. They have a rich history filled with lots of famous players and exciting matches. It’s like a really old and successful school for football heroes!

What Does 'Mbappe Out' Mean?

Okay, here's the news that might sound a bit strange. You might have heard people say 'Mbappe Out!' or seen it on the internet. What does it mean? It means that some people, who are fans of Real Madrid, want Mbappe to leave their team. They don't want him to play for Real Madrid anymore. It's like some friends want a different player to join their game. It doesn't mean Mbappe is bad. He is still a fantastic player! But sometimes, in big football teams, fans might want new players, or they might think a different player would be better for the team. It's just how football sometimes works with big decisions. Did you know? Football is the most popular sport in the world! Billions of people watch it. That means many different opinions and lots of excitement!

What is a 'Petition'?

Now, how did these fans show they wanted Mbappe to leave? They used something called an 'online petition'. Imagine you and your friends want something from your teacher, like a longer playtime. You might all write your names on a piece of paper to show how many of you want it, right? A petition is like that, but online! Many people can click a button on the internet to add their name to a list. This list shows that lots of people agree on something. In this case, many Real Madrid fans clicked to say they wanted 'Mbappe Out'. And guess what? A super big number of people signed this online petition! More than 33 million people! That's like the population of many, many cities all saying the same thing together. It shows just how many people love football and care about their favorite teams. When something gets so many people to see it and sign, we say it has 'gone viral'. It means it spread very, very quickly across the internet. Did you know? Petitions are used for many things, not just football! People sign petitions to ask for new parks, to help animals, or to make their communities better. It's a way for people to use their voices together.

Why Do Fans Want This?

This is a little tricky for us, but let's try to understand. Sometimes, fans have strong feelings about their team. Maybe they want to see different players, or they might think the team would play better with someone else. Big football teams sometimes have big discussions about players moving. It's not always easy to understand why these decisions are made. But it's part of the exciting world of professional football where players sometimes move from one famous team to another. It keeps things very interesting and always makes us wonder what will happen next! Did you know? Football players often move between different teams during their careers. It's like changing schools sometimes – new friends, new challenges, and new adventures!

What Happens Next?

So, what will happen now? Nobody knows for sure! Mbappe is still a super player, and he will keep playing amazing football, no matter what. Real Madrid is still a super team, and they will keep trying their best to win matches. The world of football is always full of surprises and excitement. We will just have to wait and see what happens with Mbappe and Real Madrid. But one thing is for sure: football will always be a wonderful game that brings joy and excitement to millions of people, like you and me! Keep cheering for your favorite teams and players, and remember to always have fun when you play football! That's all the news for today, my amazing friends! See you next time!
summary: Some fans of the famous football team Real Madrid are asking superstar player Kylian Mbappe to leave, and a very big online list called a petition with over 33 million names shows many people agree.
whyMatters: This is important because it shows how much fans care about their football teams and how big decisions about players can make lots of people talk all around the world.

originalTitle: Three women linked to Islamic State arrested in Australia on return from Syria
title: Big News from Far Away: Police Help Keep Everyone Safe!
content:
Hello, wonderful boys and girls! It's your friendly news reporter, here to share a story from far, far away. Today, we're flying across the big ocean to a country called Australia. It’s a very interesting place! Even though it's far, far away from our beautiful Africa, we can learn important lessons from what happens all around the world. Our story today is about why it’s super important to always be safe, follow good rules, and listen to the grown-ups who love you.

What Happened in Australia?

Imagine you’re going on a very long trip! Well, some grown-up ladies did that. They had been away from Australia for many years. Australia is their home country, just like Africa is our home. They lived in another country for a long, long time. Now, they decided it was time to fly back home. They got on a big airplane, flew high in the sky, and landed in Australia.

Who Are These Grown-Up Ladies?

There were three grown-up ladies. They are not kids like you! They made choices a long time ago. These choices were not good choices. They chose to be with a group that we call 'The Bad Group.' This 'Bad Group' does not follow rules. They like to make trouble. They are not kind. They do not want people to be happy and safe.

What is 'The Bad Group'? (A Simple Explanation)

Think about your school. You have rules, right? Rules like 'be kind,' 'share,' and 'don't push.' These rules help everyone stay safe and happy. But 'The Bad Group' does not like rules. They don't want people to be kind or share. They want to hurt people and make them scared. This is why they are called 'The Bad Group.' The police, and good people everywhere, do not like 'The Bad Group' because they make the world less safe.

Why Did They Fly Home?

After many years, these three ladies decided to come back to Australia. Maybe they missed their home. Maybe they wanted to see their families again. They thought they could just come back like anyone else. But the police knew about them.

What Happened When They Landed?

When their big airplane landed safely in Australia, something important happened. The police were waiting for them! The police are like our superheroes in real life. They wear uniforms, and their job is to keep everyone safe. They make sure everyone follows the rules. If someone breaks a rule, the police talk to them.

Arrested by the Police!

The police came and spoke to the three ladies. This is what we call being 'arrested.' When someone is arrested, it means the police want to ask them many questions. They want to understand why these ladies chose to be with 'The Bad Group.' They want to know if they helped 'The Bad Group' make trouble. It's like when a teacher asks you questions if you do something wrong in class. Did you know? Did you know that police officers around the world work very hard to keep us safe? They are brave people who help stop bad things from happening. They are our friends!

Why is This Important for Us?

This story might seem a little bit grown-up, but it teaches us a very important lesson. We must always, always listen to our parents, our teachers, and other trusted grown-ups. They tell us what is safe and what is not safe. They teach us good rules. Never, ever join groups that want to do bad things or break rules. Always choose to be kind. Always choose to be helpful. Always choose to follow good rules.

What Happens Next?

Now, the police in Australia will ask the three ladies many questions. They will try to find out everything. Then, a judge might decide what happens next. It’s like when a grown-up helps decide what happens if someone broke a rule. It’s all about making sure everyone is safe and that rules are followed. Did you know? Did you know that Australia is a huge country, even bigger than many countries in Africa? It has amazing animals like kangaroos and koalas!

Why Following Rules is Important

Every country in the world, including our own countries here in Africa, has rules. Rules help us live together happily. Rules keep us safe from harm. When people don't follow rules, especially big rules that hurt others, the police step in. This is why the police in Australia took the three ladies to ask them questions.

Our World is Full of Good People

Most people in the world are good people. Most people want to be kind. Most people want to help each other. Sometimes, a few people make bad choices. But remember, there are always good people, like the police, who are working hard to make sure our world is a safe and happy place for everyone, especially for wonderful kids like you! Did you know? Did you know that airplanes are one of the safest ways to travel long distances? Pilots and the people who build planes work very hard to make sure everyone is safe!

A Message from Your Reporter

So, remember, my dear friends: listen to your parents, follow the rules, be kind to everyone, and always choose good. That's how we make our homes, our schools, our countries, and our whole big world a happier and safer place! This is your African news reporter, signing off for today. Stay safe, stay happy!
summary: Three grown-up ladies who were with a 'Bad Group' far away from Australia were asked many questions by the police when they came back to their home.
whyMatters: It's important to always follow good rules, listen to grown-ups, and stay away from groups that want to do bad things, because police work to keep everyone safe and happy.

originalTitle: Chelsea favourites to sign Shaw as Man City exit nears
title: A Star Player's New Adventure!
content:
Hello, Super Football Fans!

Welcome, welcome, everybody! It's your friendly kid news reporter from Africa here, ready to share some super exciting news about football! We all love football, don't we? Kicking a ball with friends, cheering for our favourite teams, and dreaming of being big stars one day! Well, today's news is about a real-life football star, and it's making lots of people very, very happy. Guess what? There's a wonderful football player named Khadija Shaw. She is a very, very good striker. Do you know what a striker does? A striker is the player whose main job is to score goals! And Khadija Shaw is one of the best goal scorers in the whole world. Isn't that amazing?

Who is Khadija Shaw?

Khadija Shaw is a powerful lady who plays football like a superhero! She comes from a sunny island called Jamaica, which is far away but still part of our big, beautiful world. She is very tall and strong, and she can kick the ball super hard. That's why she scores so many goals! **Did you know?** Khadija Shaw's nickname is 'Bunny'! Isn't that cute? Even though she's strong, her friends call her Bunny because she's fast and jumps high for the ball, just like a bunny! She makes her country, Jamaica, very proud. She has played football since she was a little girl, just like some of you might be doing now. She worked very hard to become one of the best players ever. She is a great role model for all of us, showing that if you work hard, your dreams can come true. She has scored so many goals, it's hard to count them all!

Goodbye, Manchester City!

For a while now, Khadija Shaw has been playing for a famous team called Manchester City. This team wears blue shirts. They are from a big city in a country called England. She helped Manchester City win many games and score lots and lots of goals for them. She was a very important player for Manchester City. Everyone on the team loved having her because she was so good at finding the back of the net. But, sometimes, players decide it's time for a new adventure. It's like when you finish one school year and get ready for the next one – it's exciting to try new things! **Did you know?** Manchester City is one of the biggest football clubs in the world! Many children in Africa cheer for Manchester City because they have so many amazing players.

Hello, Chelsea! (Maybe!)

Now, here's the big news! It looks like Khadija Shaw might be moving to another super famous team! This team is called Chelsea. Chelsea also wears blue shirts, but a slightly different blue. They are also from England, but from a different big city called London. People who know a lot about football are saying that Chelsea really, really wants Khadija Shaw to join their team. They think she will help them win even more games and trophies. It's like when your friend wants you on their team for a game because they know you're super good! Chelsea is one of the 'favourites' to get her. This means that out of all the teams that might want her, Chelsea is the one most likely to get her to play for them. Isn't that exciting? A big star moving to another big team!

What Does 'Signing' Mean?

You might hear grown-ups say that Chelsea wants to 'sign' Khadija Shaw. What does that mean? It doesn't mean they want her to write her name on a piece of paper for an autograph! It means they want her to agree to play football for their team. When a player 'signs' for a team, it means they shake hands and promise to play together for a certain time. It's like when you promise your friend you'll play together every day after school. And this is going to be a 'free contract'. This means Chelsea doesn't have to pay Manchester City any money to get her. Khadija can just choose to play for Chelsea if she wants to. **Did you know?** Many football players start their careers in small teams and then move to bigger teams as they become more famous and skilled! This is how they grow in their football journey.

Why is This So Exciting?

This news is super exciting for many reasons! First, it means we get to see Khadija Shaw play even more amazing football. She is a fantastic player, and watching her score goals is always fun. Imagine all the new goals she will score! Second, it shows that hard work pays off. Khadija Shaw worked so hard to be this good, and now big teams like Chelsea want her. This is a great lesson for all of us, young football fans in Africa. If you practice and never give up, you can achieve amazing things too! She is a shining example for girls and boys everywhere who love football. She shows that anyone can be a football superstar, no matter where they come from. It's so inspiring to see African and Caribbean players shine on the world stage.

Let's Keep Cheering!

So, as Khadija Shaw gets ready for her next big adventure, let's keep cheering for her! Whether she wears the blue of Manchester City or the blue of Chelsea, she will always be a football hero. We will watch closely to see where she goes. Remember, football is about teamwork, fun, and dreams. Keep playing, keep dreaming, and keep cheering for your favourite players! Who knows, maybe one day we will be reporting about YOU playing for a big team! Keep well and stay sporty, my friends!
summary: Super star football player Khadija Shaw, known for scoring lots of goals, is likely to leave Manchester City and join another big team called Chelsea for her next exciting adventure.
whyMatters: This is important because Khadija Shaw is a fantastic role model for kids in Africa and everywhere, showing that hard work helps you achieve big dreams in football and inspires more girls and boys to play.

originalTitle: Liverpool reduce planned rise in ticket prices
title: Liverpool reduce planned rise in ticket prices
content: Liverpool cut the size of their planned rise in ticket prices for the next couple of seasons after fan protests.
